name: AnalysisRigidDiaphragm
summary: The AnalysisRigidDiaphragm class contains information related to analysis rigid diaphragms.

constructors.name: AnalysisRigidDiaphragm
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisRigidDiaphragm class

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis rigid diaphragm. The ID has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: ExtremaMaximum
properties.summary: The maximum of the extrema (in the global coordinate system).

properties.name: ExtremaMinimum
properties.summary: The minimum of the extrema (in the global coordinate system).

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: MasterNodeID
properties.summary: The identifier of the master node.
